title: thelypodium micranthum
intro: Thelypodium micranthum, also known as small-flowered thelypody, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Thelypodium micranthum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Thelypodium micranthum include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
